# Tomás Rivera

Tomás Rivera heads Investor Relations at Acme Corp and is a steady supporter of the engagement, because a credible carbon baseline is exactly what lenders and rating agencies keep asking him for. His formal authority is limited — he doesn't own data or budget — but he shapes how the board and the COO think about the engagement's external value.

Tomás reports to CFO Victor Lin and feeds Reema Sharma the investor narrative that makes the baseline feel worth the cost. He is a useful ally for the consultant when the conversation turns to why the work matters, even though he can't unblock data or approve spend himself.
